title: bidens campylotheca subsp. campylotheca
intro: Bidens campylotheca subsp. campylotheca, also known as the hairy beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bidens campylotheca subsp. campylotheca include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
